channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mets fans now have more reason to be optimistic about the future
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- As the World Series gets going Friday night in Los Angeles between the Yankees and Dodgers, let's give some credit to the New York Mets. Yes, they fell short and it stings and their magical run came to an end on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Nestor Cortes expects to be on Yankees World Series roster, even if it's a long-term health risk
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nestor Cortes expects to be on the New York Yankees' World Series roster against the Los Angeles Dodgers after throwing two innings of batting practice and pronouncing himself recovered from an elbow injury that has sidelined him for more than a month.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Vinicius Junior scores hat trick as Real Madrid beats Dortmund 5-2 in Champions League
item.description: Vinicius Junior scored a hat trick as Real Madrid turned boos into cheers with a 5-2 win over Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League on Tuesday, while Paris Saint-Germain dropped more points.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: William Nylander scores twice, powers Maple Leafs over Lightning 5-2
item.description: William Nylander had two goals and an assist as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Tampa Bay Lightning 5-2 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: PPR Podcast #194: Brodie Stump, Kearny QB
item.description: All Kearny's Brodie Stump does is throw touchdown passes. That's why he's earned a center seat in PPR Podcast #194.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego FC to play St. Louis in inaugural home match at Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: Major League Soccer unveiled the first match and home opener for San Diego FC on Monday as they approach their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jets struggles continue despite coaching changes and new additions
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- The fish stinks from the head down. The Jets are a dysfunctional mess, and it begins with the Jets owner Woody Johnson. Since 2000, when he bought the team, the Jets record is 170 and 224.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Want to see the Dodgers in the World Series? Prepare for sticker shock
item.description: The Boys in Blue are back in the World Series, and the matchup with the New York Yankees is sure to draw a great deal of attention. If you want to catch a game in person, however, it will also cost you a great deal of cash.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: WNBA players union decides to opt out of current collective bargaining agreement
item.description: The current CBA will still cover the 2025 season so the two sides have a year to negotiate a new agreement.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New York Liberty win first WNBA championship, beating Minnesota 67-62 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As confetti fell and Frank Sinatra’s “New York, New York” blared through the arena, the New York Liberty celebrated the end of a long odyssey.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Russell Wilson throws for 2 TDs, runs for another TD in Pittsburgh debut as Steelers rout Jets 37-15
item.description: PITTSBURGH (AP) — Russell Wilson sat at the podium, uniform still on, in no rush to move on from a moment he believed would always come. Even as the weeks passed and his aching calf struggled to get better. Even as Justin Fields deftly guided the Pittsburgh Steelers in his place.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Dodgers vs. Yankees in the World Series? It's more common than you think
item.description: The Fall Classic is set, and the matchup is a classic all right. The Los Angeles Dodgers clinched the National League pennant on Sunday, closing out the New York Mets in six games in the NL Championship Series. That means that baseball fans are getting a dream matchup in the World Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Photo Gallery: NL Champs! Dodgers finish Mets to advance to World Series
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are heading to the 2024 World Series. With a 10-5 home win over the Mets on Sunday, the Dodgers claimed their 25th National League pennant, beating New York 4 games to 2 in the best of seven series.
item.dc:creator: Lily Dallow, KTLA 5

item.title: Patrick Mahomes and Chiefs stay undefeated, beat 49ers 28-18 in Super Bowl rematch
item.description: The formula might look a bit different with the defense and running game carrying the Kansas City Chiefs. But the results are awfully familiar as the two-time defending champions keep knocking off teams — especially the San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Moody agrees to 3-year, $39M extension with Warriors: report
item.description: (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors and guard Moses Moody have agreed to a multi-year contract extension, ESPN's Shams Charania posted Sunday evening on X. The extension is reportedly for three years and $39 million, which is an average annual value of about $13 million.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: SEC fines Tennessee $100,000 for rushing the field after win over Alabama
item.description: While Tennessee was fined $100,000 when fans rushed the field after beating Alabama in 2022, this penalty is the school's first violation since the policy was revised last year.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Raucoules, NewsNation

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, Fox 5

item.title: Bears hanging tough in an NFC North that's dominated the rest of the NFL so far
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Never in the past two decades has any division started out as strong as the NFC North has this season. With the undefeated Minnesota Vikings leading the way, all four NFC North teams are 4-2 or better.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Anaheim knocks off Utah in overtime, 5-4
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) - After winning two overtime games to begin its first road trip, the Utah Hockey Club closed out the trip with an overtime loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
